author: Alexandre Stanislawski
subject: The rule applied to distinct should prevent the API to generate errors
body:
This rule work as follows :
 - if no distinct and no filters are applied : force distinct to
   false
 - if no distinct and some filters : do not set the distinct
 - if distinct set to true and no filters : force distinct to false
 - if distinct set to true and no filters : let the distinct as true
 - if distinct set to false (with or without filters) : let the distinct
   set to false
